commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR moves the runtime `HEARTBEAT.md` bootstrap template under `src/agents/templates`, keeps docs templates as secondary roots for other workspace templates, adds a doctor repair for legacy heartbeat templates, and updates package guards and tests.

PR surface: Source +281, Tests +283, Docs +11, Config +1, Other 0. Total +576 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current `main` bootstraps `HEARTBEAT.md` from a docs template containing prose/link content, while the heartbeat empty checker only ignores headings, empty stubs, and fences.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer review should decide whether to accept the compatibility-sensitive doctor repair and package-template split; no automated code repair is indicated.

target.title: fix(ui): scope usage requests by agent filter
target.body:
Fixes #87132.

## Summary
- pass a single selected `agent:<id>` usage query through to both `sessions.usage` and `usage.cost` as `agentId`
- populate the Usage page agent filter from `agents.list` so non-main agents are selectable before their usage sessions are loaded
- reload usage data when the applied query changes the server-side agent scope
- retry without `agentId` and remember legacy compatibility when an older gateway rejects the field

## Tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render-usage-tab.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json ui/src/ui/app-render-usage-tab.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage.ts ui/src/ui/views/usageTypes.ts ui/src/ui/app-render-usage-tab.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed**: The Control UI Usage page rendered an agent filter but `loadUsage` always called usage RPCs without `agentId`, so the gateway scoped omitted requests to the default/main agent and non-main usage could not be loaded consistently from that filter. This patch also preserves older-gateway compatibility by detecting and caching unsupported `agentId` rejection.

**Real environment tested**: Local openclaw checkout at head `9e9dc4ab4d2028a1befe3480cf8a7bc25cd5f302` on Linux with the repository UI controller and Usage view tests.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD) node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.node.test.ts -t "passes a single selected agent query as sessions and cost agentId|falls back and remembers compatibility when sessions.usage rejects agentId" --reporter=verbose`

**Evidence after fix**:
```text
RUN  v4.1.7 /media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw-issue-87132

✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.node.test.ts > usage controller date interpretation params > passes a single selected agent query as sessions and cost agentId 7ms
✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.node.test.ts > usage controller date interpretation params > falls back and remembers compatibility when sessions.usage rejects agentId 5ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  2 passed | 10 skipped (12)
Duration  459ms
```

**Observed result after fix**: A single concrete `agent:research` Usage query resolves to `research`, which `loadUsage` includes as `agentId` in both `sessions.usage` and `usage.cost` unless the gateway has been remembered as legacy-incompatible; the same controller detects an older gateway's `agentId` validation rejection and retries without the field.

**What was not tested**: I did not run a live browser against a multi-agent gateway; validation covered the UI controller request payload, legacy retry behavior, Usage tab reload behavior, and rendered agent filter options with local Vitest.
target.author: alix-007

commands.reason: matching ClawSweeper response comment already exists
